steps.title: Target aesthetic qualities
steps.content: The goal is to quote Ortiz while emphasizing the aesthetic qualities of stop motion animation. The relevant quoted language describes charm, warmth, beauty, imperfection, and human quality.

steps.title: Reject process details
steps.content:
• Choice B focuses on technical difficulty and image capture.
  • Choice C focuses on materials and history.
  • Choice D focuses on the production challenge of each shot.

steps.title: Quote the aesthetic language
steps.content: The remaining choice combines Ortiz's quotations about imperfection, human quality, charm, warmth, and beauty, directly emphasizing SMA's aesthetics. The answer is A.
